# Speisely

English: Speisely is a Germany-wide marketplace for restaurants, catering, and event planning. It helps restaurants, caterers, and event planners get discovered by people looking for catering services in Germany, event planners in Germany, and food ordering options across major cities like Berlin, Munich, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Cologne, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Leipzig, Nuremberg, and Dresden.

Deutsch: Speisely ist ein deutschlandweiter Marktplatz für Restaurants, Catering und Eventplanung. Die Plattform verbindet Restaurants, Caterer und Eventplaner mit Kunden, die nach catering-services in Deutschland, eventplanern in Deutschland und essen bestellen in Deutschland suchen — auch in Städten wie Berlin, München, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Köln, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Leipzig, Nürnberg und Dresden.

Main URL: https://speisely.de
Sitemap: https://speisely.de/sitemap.xml
Full Documentation for LLMs: https://speisely.de/llms-full.txt

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://speisely.de
- Instant Order (restaurant discovery): https://speisely.de/instant-order
- Catering Marketplace: https://speisely.de/catering
- Event Planner Directory: https://speisely.de/planner
- Partner / Pricing Page: https://speisely.de/partners
- Blog: https://speisely.de/blog
- About Us: https://speisely.de/about

## Specialized Catering Services
- Daily Catering Subscriptions: https://speisely.de/catering/daily-catering-subscriptions
- Institutional Catering: https://speisely.de/catering/institutional-catering
- Events Catering: https://speisely.de/catering/events

## Language & Service Area
- Language: Default German, with English available via language toggle.
- Service Area: Germany-wide. All major cities covered including Berlin, Munich, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Cologne, Stuttgart, Düsseldorf, Leipzig, Nuremberg, and Dresden.

## What Services Does Speisely Offer?
1. **Instant Orders** — Restaurants list their menus on Speisely and receive direct pickup and delivery orders from customers. Routing payments to their own Stripe or PayPal accounts.
2. **Catering Marketplace** — Post and respond to catering inquiries (corporate, private, weddings, daily office, institutional catering).
3. **Event Planning** — CRM and planning tool for professional event planners to handle event briefs.
